signals.headline: Congress Ends Alliance with Left Front, Announces Candidates for All 294 Seats in West Bengal 2026 Assembly Elections |
signals.raw:
Congress Ends Alliance with Left Front, Announces Candidates for All 294 Seats in West Bengal 2026 Assembly Elections | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Congress has officially decided to contest all 294 seats independently, releasing a list of 284 candidates and terminating its decade-long alliance with the Left Front, reshaping the multi-cornered contest against TMC and BJP.[1]  
This shift, confirmed

signals.headline: South Korea's Annual Inflation Rate Rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's Annual Inflation Rate Rose to 2.2% in March 2026 | YES | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in January and February but below market forecasts of 2.4%, remaining near the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid contained price pressures before global energy volatility.[2] This marks a slight uptick after easing to 2% in early 20
